classic.clue: A survivor connected to motorcycles, racing, and rebellious street style.
hints: This survivor is from the Cursed Legacy chapter.
Her first name is Yui.

classic.clue: A survivor connected to fame, music production, and the All-Kill chapter.
hints: She worked in the music industry.
She worked with Ji-Woon Hak.

classic.clue: A survivor tied to street art, urban movement, and a rebellious lifestyle.
hints: She is from the Last Breath chapter.
Her first name is Nea.

classic.clue: A killer connected to fame, music, neon style, and knives.
hints: He is from the All-Kill chapter.
His real name is Ji-Woon Hak.

killer.clue: This killer is more than one person, but the trial only shows one at a time.
hints: Their power is tied to chaining injuries.
Frank, Julie, Susie, and Joey.

killer.clue: This killer turns performance and attention into something deadly.
hints: He is connected to the All-Kill chapter.
He throws knives.
The audio clue matters a lot.
She hums a lullaby.
The TV is the biggest clue.
Her name is Sadako.

perk.clue: After a rushed vault, you break into a sprint.
hints: It is a survivor exhaustion perk.
The name starts with L.

perk.clue: When a generator is close to completion, survivors face a chain of difficult skill checks.
hints: It is a killer perk.
It belongs to Onryo.
This is not a normal character.
It controls the realm.

lore.clue: A performer whose career became tied to violence, fame, and bright neon style.
hints: He is from All-Kill.
His real name is Ji-Woon Hak.

terror.clue: A lullaby reaches you before the real danger fully arrives.
hints: This is an audio clue before the chase gets serious.
Hatchets.
